insight: Use AI to execute specific SEO production tasks (keyword research, page titles, metadata, URL structuring, subheadings, research, citations) to drastically increase content production speed.
quote: We're using it to do keyword research… write page titles… restructure URL slugs… I can use it to write subheadings, research, citations.

insight: Generate SEO content using AI but control output quality by feeding structured prompts, directives, and business-specific context instead of relying on generic prompts.
quote: We'll still give it prompts… directives… the information that it needs.

insight: Build long-form, high-intent landing pages (3,000–5,000 words) targeting city + service combinations with FAQs, internal linking, and conversion-focused structure.
quote: City + practice combinations… 3,000–5,000 words… Clear FAQs… Internal linking… Conversion-focused structure.

insight: Prioritize keywords that directly drive conversions and revenue instead of producing informational content, as AI search reduces top-of-funnel traffic value.
quote: We're only going to look at the keywords that are going to drive business value.

insight: Map each keyword to actual SERP behavior (ads, local pack, AI results) and choose the optimal channel instead of defaulting to SEO content creation.
quote: We're plugging that in manually and saying… what's happening in search engines.

insight: Combine SEO and PPC datasets using AI to identify keywords where organic content can replace high CPC paid traffic.
quote: Keywords they're spending $50 a click on where a content push could eliminate that cost entirely.

insight: Automate link prospecting and outreach by feeding AI predefined SOPs including search operators, quality filters, and outreach workflows.
quote: Prospects link opportunities… pulls DR and traffic… runs through our checklist… builds outreach sequences.

insight: Build standardized prompt libraries and run them repeatedly (weekly) across AI search engines to track visibility and performance trends.
quote: We build a list of standard prompts and run them on a weekly basis.

insight: Automate AI search tracking by creating agents that continuously run prompts, log outputs, and generate datasets for analysis and visualization.
quote: An AI agent that's constantly prompting… documenting… and building visualization.

insight: Train AI on brand-specific design systems and workflows to scale landing page and funnel creation rapidly after initial setup.
quote: Once it has your design style down… you can go from idea to fully funnel in minutes.
